description: A color photograph of a press conference. A man in a dark suit, glasses and a purple patterned tie speaks into a microphone at a wooden lectern bearing the Department of Homeland Security seal. A second man stands behind him and an out-of-focus audience member's head appears in the foreground. A backdrop to the right displays partly visible text reading OPERATION TWIN SHIELD along with the U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services and Federal Bureau of Investigation names. An American flag stands at left.
notable_text: OPERATION TWIN SHIELD; U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services; FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION
